title: spiraea betulifolia
intro: Spiraea betulifolia, also known as Birchleaf Spiraea, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Korea, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Spiraea betulifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health problems.
